overall.description: Third-person gameplay of a Japanese horror video game featuring a schoolgirl in a blood-stained uniform exploring a dimly lit traditional mansion. The character walks through wooden corridors illuminated by firelight, transitioning from clean interiors to a corrupted area with organic growth hanging from the ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance foyer with large wooden sliding door

events.description: character slides open the wooden lattice door to enter the interior corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden sliding door and opening it to enter the mansion interior

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese sliding door with wooden lattice design and circular emblems
decorative wooden lattice screen with circular family crest emblems
metal handle on the sliding door

segments.scene_description: The character stands before a large traditional wooden sliding door in a dimly lit entrance. She reaches out and slides the door open, revealing the dark corridor beyond. The warm light illuminates the blood stains on her school uniform.

events.description: passing a burning fire on the right side of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down the dimly lit wooden corridor, passing burning debris on the right

entered.detail: traditional wooden panel walls with paper screens
traditional wooden panel walls showing fire damage
small fire burning on the floor against the wall
single hanging light illuminating the corridor with orange glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow wooden corridor illuminated by firelight. A small fire burns on the right side, casting flickering shadows on the traditional panel walls. The ceiling light fixture hangs overhead as she moves deeper into the mansion.

events.description: ceiling and walls begin showing organic red corruption and hanging growth

agents.ego_description: continuing down the hallway past wooden cabinets and traditional furniture

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden storage cabinet with drawers and lattice doors
hanging scroll with artwork mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds past a wooden storage cabinet on the right and a wall scroll on the left. The corridor continues with traditional furnishings. Near the end of this segment, the ceiling begins to show disturbing red organic growth hanging down like roots or tentacles.

scene_state.functional_zone: corrupted hallway with organic growth and barrier gate

events.description: approaching the wooden slatted gate at the end of the heavily corrupted corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the heavily corrupted section with hanging organic matter, approaching a wooden gate barrier

entered.detail: red fleshy organic matter hanging from the ceiling like tentacles or roots
wooden slatted gate blocking the end of the corridor
intense fire burning on the left side of the corridor
intense fire burning on the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a nightmarish corridor where red organic growth hangs from the ceiling like bloody vines. Fires burn intensely on both sides, illuminating the blood-stained walls. She approaches a wooden slatted gate that blocks the path forward, the air thick with smoke and an ominous red glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a traditional Japanese mansion that gradually transforms from a dimly lit interior into a nightmarish, corrupted corridor. It begins with the character sliding open a large wooden door, where warm light reveals the blood stains on her school uniform as she enters a dark hallway. As she moves deeper into the mansion, the camera follows her past flickering fires and traditional panel walls, passing a storage cabinet and a wall scroll. The scene then shifts as disturbing red organic growth begins to descend from the ceiling like roots, eventually overtaking the architecture. Finally, the corridor expands into a hellish landscape of bloody vines and intense fires that illuminate stained walls, leading the character toward a wooden slatted gate amidst a thick, ominous red glow.
